contact.name: Name

about.title: About LootNest
about.p1: LootNest was born from a simple obsession: finding the coolest, most useful products and sharing them with everyone.
about.p2: Our mission: find interesting products, test them thoroughly, and give you our honest, unfiltered opinion. No sponsored reviews. No pay-for-play. Just real people testing real products.
about.p3: If it's great, we'll tell you. If it falls short, you'll hear about that too.
about.submitCTA: Got a product we should review? Submit it here →

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: LootNest ("we," "our," or "us") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.p2: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name and email when you subscribe or submit a form.
privacy.p3: Information you provide voluntarily, plus browsing data collected automatically through cookies and analytics.
privacy.p4: To send newsletters, respond to inquiries, improve our website, and analyze traffic.
privacy.p5: We may use services like Google Analytics. These may collect browsing activity information.
privacy.p6: If you have questions, reach out through our contact page.

affiliate.title: Editorial Policy
affiliate.p1: At LootNest, our reviews are driven by one thing: honest, hands-on experience. We test every product we feature.
affiliate.p2: We do not accept payment or free products in exchange for positive reviews. If it's great, we'll say so. If it has flaws, you'll hear about those too.
affiliate.p3: We may use affiliate links to support the site. This never affects our ratings or recommendations.
affiliate.tldr: TL;DR: Real reviews, real opinions. No brand tells us what to say. Affiliate links are always disclosed.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.b1: By accessing or using LootNest, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our site.
terms.b1_1: You must be at least 13 years old to use this website.
terms.b1_2: You agree not to use the site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these terms.
terms.b1_3: We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, or remove content at our sole discretion.
terms.b2: We may update these terms at any time. Changes take effect immediately upon posting.
terms.b2_1: It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically.
terms.b2_2: Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.b3: By submitting content to LootNest, you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute it on our platform.
terms.b4: All original content on LootNest is our property. Product images and trademarks belong to their respective owners.
terms.b4_1: You may not reproduce or republish our reviews without attribution and a link back.
terms.b4_2: Product images used in reviews are for identification and commentary purposes only.
terms.b5: Some links on our site are affiliate links. If you click and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
terms.b6: LootNest provides product reviews and recommendations for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any information.
terms.b7: LootNest shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of the site or reliance on any information provided. Use at your own risk.
terms.b8: For questions about these terms, please reach out through our contact page.
terms.summary: By using LootNest, you agree to these terms. Questions? Contact us anytime.

dmca.title: DMCA Policy
dmca.intro: LootNest respects intellectual property rights. This policy outlines our procedure for handling copyright infringement claims under the DMCA.
dmca.p1: If you believe your copyrighted work has been infringed on our site, send a written notice with the following information:
dmca.i1: A signature of the copyright owner or authorized agent.
dmca.i2: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to be infringed.
dmca.i3: Identification of the infringing material and its location on our site (URL).
dmca.i4: Your contact information: name, address, phone number, and email.
dmca.i5: A statement that you have a good faith belief the use is not authorized.
dmca.i6: A statement under penalty of perjury that the information is accurate and you are authorized to act.
dmca.p2: If you believe material you posted was removed by mistake, you may file a counter-notification. We may restore removed material within 10-14 business days unless the original complainant files a court action.
dmca.contact: Send DMCA notices via our Contact page. We will respond promptly to all valid claims.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: LootNest is committed to making our website accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities.
accessibility.p1: We strive to follow Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA standards to ensure our content is accessible to all visitors.
accessibility.p2: We implement the following accessibility measures:
accessibility.i1: Semantic HTML structure for screen reader compatibility.
accessibility.i4: Descriptive alt text for all images.
accessibility.i5: Consistent, predictable navigation throughout the site.
accessibility.p3: We welcome feedback on accessibility. If you encounter any barriers or have suggestions, please contact us. We will address issues promptly.
